# Ajay K Madan - AI-SDLC Transformation Consultant & Fractional CTO

> Ajay K Madan helps medium and large enterprises adopt AI across the software
> development lifecycle: fast, measured, and safe. 25 years of experience
> building enterprise-grade products from early-stage startups to mature global
> companies. Based in India, working with clients globally.

## What Ajay consults on

- AI-SDLC transformation: maturity assessment, rollout strategy, change management,
  and the safeguards (specs, quality gates, measurement, governance) that make
  AI-driven speed trustworthy, including in regulated industries such as healthcare
  and finance.
- Legacy migration acceleration with AI: the "migration factory" pattern of
  repeatable stations (scope, specify, generate, verify, release) with human
  control gates at spec sign-off, verification, and release approval.
- Spec-driven development: behavior specs as the contract that makes AI output
  verifiable (one spec drives code, tests, review, and documentation).
- Engineering measurement: a four-rung ladder (cost, usage, quality, outcome)
  for proving AI adoption works; annual distillations of the DORA State of DevOps research.
- Fractional CTO / VP Engineering, engineering leadership, post-merger technology
  integration, offshore development center setup.

## Key pages

- [AI-SDLC Frameworks](https://ajaykmadan.in/ai-sdlc/): the operating manual, covering
  the maturity model, spec-driven development, the migration factory, the measurement
  ladder, and an FAQ.
- [Blog](https://ajaykmadan.in/blog/): essays on AI-SDLC, DORA report summaries,
  engineering leadership, and post-merger integration.
- [Projects](https://ajaykmadan.in/projects/key-projects/): anonymized client case studies.
- [About](https://ajaykmadan.in/about/): background and experience.
- [Contact](https://ajaykmadan.in/contact/): schedule a free consultation.
